tests.message: Call model.eval() to disable dropout and use running stats for batch norm.
Use torch.no_grad() context manager to disable gradient tracking during evaluation.
Use torch.max() to get predicted class labels from logits.
Compare predictions with labels to compute correct predictions.
Sum the correct predictions to get total accuracy count.
Return both average loss and accuracy as a tuple.
